description_long: This jewelry set features a vibrant necklace and matching earrings displayed on a neutral bust stand. The necklace is composed of alternating turquoise blue and magenta beads, with the turquoise beads varying in size and shape, including both round and elongated forms. The magenta beads are larger and spherical, providing a striking contrast to the blue elements. The earrings are dangle-style, each with a turquoise bead and a clear, faceted crystal-like component, suspended from simple metal hooks. The necklace is fastened at the back with a visible metallic clasp, and the overall design is playful yet coordinated. The color palette and bead arrangement give the set a bold, geometric, and slightly retro aesthetic.
description: A colorful beaded necklace and matching dangle earrings in turquoise and magenta, displayed on a bust stand. The set features round and elongated beads with metallic clasps and hooks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with alternating turquoise and magenta beads, and both earrings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the profile of the necklace and the curvature of the beads around the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metallic clasp of the necklace and the back of the bust stand.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the necklace's side profile and the arrangement of beads along the bust's contour.
